programs.title: Awara Paagal Deewana
programs.desc: A henpecked husband and his father-in-law are intrigued by their new neighbour Gulab Khatri, a recluse and mysterious man. They unwittingly get embroiled in a mafia rivalry when they find out that he's a wanted criminal.

programs.title: Phir Hera Pheri
programs.desc: The lives of three men changes overnight when they lose all the money they invested in a scam. Now, they must find another way to repay the dreaded loan sharks or face their death.
